procedure.name: Atomic Red Team validation for T1070
procedure.description: Automated emulation procedure for T1070 executed via Invoke-AtomicRedTeam inside the Metatron lab environment.

runs.stdout:
Executing test: T1070.004-VNS-Simulation
PathToAtomicsFolder = /opt/atomic-red-team/atomics
[VNS] No Linux atomic for T1070.004 (File Deletion). Injecting technique-representative traffic into Virtual Network Sensor.
Tactic(s): defense-evasion
[VNS] 1/5 events flagged suspicious

command: Import-Module '/opt/invoke-atomicredteam/Invoke-AtomicRedTeam.psd1' -ErrorAction Stop; $env:PathToAtomicsFolder='/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics'; try { Invoke-AtomicTest T1070.004 -PathToAtomicsFolder '/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics' -TestNumbers 1 -GetPrereqs -ErrorAction Continue } catch { Write-Host '[WARN] GetPrereqs failed for T1070.004'; }; Invoke-AtomicTest T1070.004 -PathToAtomicsFolder '/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics' -TestNumbers 1

sigma.title: Remove Exported Mailbox from Exchange Webserver

osquery.name: t1070_proc_hidden
osquery.query_text: SELECT pid, name, path, cmdline, on_disk, cwd FROM processes WHERE on_disk = 0 OR path = '' ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 100;

osquery.name: t1070_file_mod
osquery.query_text: SELECT path, filename, size, uid, gid, mode, mtime, atime FROM file WHERE (path LIKE '/tmp/%' OR path LIKE '/dev/shm/%' OR path LIKE '/var/tmp/%') AND mtime > (strftime('%s','now') - 3600) LIMIT 100;

sigma_matches.title: Remove Exported Mailbox from Exchange Webserver
